entries.title: About the Course
entries.content:
This course includeds the following topic(s): Math Lessons: Grade 5, Math Games: Grades 1-8

About Math Lessons: Grade 5
Discover mathematical concepts using manipulatives. Learn strategies and build agility through mental math. RightStart E Primary Skill Focus: Division, Fractions, Percents

About Math Games: Grades 1-8
Practice and learn math facts through games.

entries.title: Placement & Combining Tips
entries.content:
Math Lessons: Grade 5
Students who are new to RightStart Math should take the placement test on the RightStart website (rightstartmath.com). 
Prerequisite: RightStart D or appropriate skill proficiency
